title: Breadth-First Search, Queues, and Unweighted Shortest Paths · Contract Workshop
summary: A museum puzzle team incrementally builds deque-based shortest-path solver from original seeded fixtures while retaining earlier Python, graph, determinism, accessibility, testing, performance, and recovery requirements. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of deque-based shortest-path solver while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Maintain a FIFO frontier whose discovered distances advance in nondecreasing edge count.
Use deque append and popleft with explicit membership state and bounded duplicate work.
Assign distance and predecessor at first discovery and reconstruct a valid route after reaching the goal.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-maze-solver-python cumulative accessible desktop maze portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python grid, graph, search, state, and scheduler models
with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Native Tcl, Tk, tkinter, windows, Canvas, fonts,
focus, input devices, assistive technology, files, platform timing, installers, display scaling,
packaging, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class MazePolicy:
    rows: int = 12
    columns: int = 16
    seed: int = 314159
    maximum_cells: int = 16_384
    reduced_motion: bool = False


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class MazeEvidence:
    revision: str
    topology_digest: str
    action_trace_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str
    artifact_digest: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python maze solver portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Evidence: maze-bfs-changed-cases-idzbqo
# Competency: maze-bfs-changed-cases.
# Case 7040: a clean desktop release rehearsal.
# Operating constraint: the player cannot rely on color or animation.
# Changed case: change display scale and retain focus and control access.
def evidence_maze_bfs_changed_cases_idzbqo(reported_edges: int = 18, oracle_edges: int = 18, discovered: int = 39, predecessor_links: int = 38, fifo_order_valid: bool = True) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_idzbqo = "idzbqo-oqbzdi-7040"
    assert evidence_variant_idzbqo
    evidence_axes_idzbqo = (
        "grididzbqo",
        "topology7040",
        "searchoqbzdi",
        "eventidzbqo7040",
        "access7040idzbqo",
        "recoveryoqbzdi7040",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_idzbqo)) == 6
    if reported_edges < 0 or oracle_edges < 0 or discovered < 1:
        return False, reported_edges, "bfs-count"
    if reported_edges != oracle_edges:
        return False, reported_edges, "nonshortest-route"
    if predecessor_links != discovered - 1:
        return False, predecessor_links, "predecessor-map"
    if not fifo_order_valid:
        return False, discovered, "frontier-order"
    assert reported_edges == oracle_edges
    return True, reported_edges, "shortest-unweighted-route"
